GRAND PALAIS Handbag The Grand Palais Handbag continues the travel spirit of Monogram with branded hardware and a lock. Neat compartments and pockets facilitate storage. A detachable and adjustable shoulder strap enables handheld, elbow, and crossbody experiences.
